allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add production readiness and CI/CD pipeline

Security:
- Protect admin routes with JWT + admin policy
- Protect browse API with tenant auth
- Add security headers and CORS to API and Portal
- Add AdminUserIds/AdminEmailPatterns configuration

Infrastructure:
- Add Dockerfiles for API, Portal, MCP, Workers
- Add Kubernetes manifests with Kustomize overlays
- Add Traefik IngressRoute for develop environment
- Externalize all secrets via environment variables

CI/CD:
- Add CI workflow for build and test
- Add deploy-develop workflow for auto-deploy to cluster
- Support ghcr.io container registry
- Add self-hosted runner manifests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
